jobs.title: Tester conversazioni vocali AI (French native speaker - Switzerland regional variant)
jobs.description:
TSMG cerca Tester conversazioni vocali AI (French native speaker - Switzerland regional variant) per attivita operative sul territorio in Lausanne. Di seguito trovi il testo integrale dell'annuncio Lever, con responsabilita, requisiti e dettagli pratici del progetto.

Company description Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges. Project overview We are looking for native speakers to participate in a conversational audio data collection project that supports the development of advanced speech and conversational AI technologies. Participants will take part in natural, unscripted conversations with another participant in their native language. The conversations will be recorded in a controlled acoustic environment and guided by a moderator. The collected audio will be used to help train and improve large-scale speech recognition and conversational AI systems.

## Panoramica del progetto

Company description Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges. Project overview We are looking for native speakers to participate in a conversational audio data collection project that supports the development of advanced speech and conversational AI technologies. Participants will take part in natural, unscripted conversations with another participant in their native language. The conversations will be recorded in a controlled acoustic environment and guided by a moderator. The collected audio will be used to help train and improve large-scale speech recognition and conversational AI systems.

## Responsibilities

- Participate in a natural conversation with another participant in your native language
- Discuss one of several suggested general-interest topics provided during the session
- Take part in the conversation for approximately 2 hours
- Attend a short technical setup and equipment check before the recording begins
- Follow the session guidelines and moderator instructions

## Requirements

- Native speaker of the target language
- Comfortable participating in paired conversations
- Able to provide informed consent for participation
- Reliable and able to attend the full session

descriptionByLocale.de: TSMG sucht Tester für KI-Sprachkonversationen (Italienisch Muttersprache – Schweiz regionaler Dialekt) für operative Tätigkeiten im Raum Bellinzona. Nachfolgend finden Sie den vollständigen Lever‑Stellenanzeigentext mit Verantwortlichkeiten, Anforderungen und praktischen Projektdetails. Unternehmensbeschreibung Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) ist ein Feld‑Datenerfassungsunternehmen, das 2017 in Europa gegründet wurde. Wir sammeln Daten dort, wo Automatisierung nicht möglich ist. Wir zählen Merkmale, machen Fotos, erstellen Videos, nehmen Sprache auf und scannen Bereiche für jedes Detail, das Sie benötigen, um fundiertere Entscheidungen zu treffen. Unsere Feld‑Datenerfassungsteams sind in ganz Europa und Nordamerika verteilt und bereit, neue Herausforderungen anzunehmen. Projektübersicht Wir suchen Muttersprachler, die an einem Projekt zur Sammlung von konversationalen Audiodaten teilnehmen, das die Entwicklung fortschrittlicher Sprach‑ und Konversations‑KI‑Technologien unterstützt. Die Teilnehmenden führen natürliche, ungeskriptete Gespräche mit einer anderen Person in ihrer Muttersprache. Die Gespräche werden in einer kontrollierten akustischen Umgebung aufgezeichnet und von einem Moderator geleitet. Die gesammelten Audiodaten werden verwendet, um großskalige Spracherkennungs‑ und Konversations‑KI‑Systeme zu trainieren und zu verbessern. ## Verantwortlichkeiten - An einem natürlichen Gespräch mit einem anderen Teilnehmenden in Ihrer Muttersprache teilnehmen - Ein Thema aus mehreren vorgeschlagenen allgemeinen Interessensgebieten, die während der Sitzung bereitgestellt werden, diskutieren - Ca. 2 Stunden am Gespräch teilnehmen - Vor Beginn der Aufnahme an einer kurzen technischen Einrichtung und Geräteprüfung teilnehmen - Den Sitzungsrichtlinien und den Anweisungen des Moderators folgen ## Anforderungen - Muttersprache der Zielsprache - Komfortabel beim Führen von Paar‑Gesprächen - In der Lage, eine informierte Einwilligung zur Teilnahme zu geben - Zuverlässig und in der Lage, die gesamte Sitzung zu besuchen
descriptionByLocale.fr: TSMG recherche Testeur de conversations vocales IA (locuteur natif italien – variante régionale Suisse) pour des activités opérationnelles sur le territoire de Bellinzona. Vous trouverez ci‑dessous le texte intégral de l’annonce Lever, avec responsabilités, exigences et détails pratiques du projet. Description de l’entreprise Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) est une société de collecte de données sur le terrain fondée en 2017 en Europe. Nous collectons des données là où l’automatisation n’est pas possible. Nous comptons les caractéristiques, prenons des photos, réalisons des vidéos, enregistrons la parole et scannons les zones pour chaque détail dont vous avez besoin afin de prendre des décisions plus éclairées. Nos équipes de collecte de données sur le terrain sont réparties à travers l’Europe et l’Amérique du Nord, prêtes à relever de nouveaux défis. Aperçu du projet Nous recherchons des locuteurs natifs pour participer à un projet de collecte de données audio conversationnelles qui soutient le développement de technologies avancées de parole et d’IA conversationnelle. Les participants prendront part à des conversations naturelles et non scénarisées avec un autre participant dans leur langue maternelle. Les conversations seront enregistrées dans un environnement acoustique contrôlé et guidées par un modérateur. Les enregistrements audio seront utilisés pour entraîner et améliorer les systèmes de reconnaissance vocale à grande échelle et les IA conversationnelles. ## Responsabilités - Participer à une conversation naturelle avec un autre participant dans votre langue maternelle - Discuter d’un des plusieurs sujets d’intérêt général proposés pendant la session - Prendre part à la conversation pendant environ 2 heures - Assister à une courte configuration technique et vérification de l’équipement avant le début de l’enregistrement - Suivre les consignes de la session et les instructions du modérateur ## Exigences - Locuteur natif de la langue cible - À l’aise pour participer à des conversations en binôme - Capable de fournir un consentement éclairé pour la participation - Fiable et capable d’assister à la session complète

jobs.title: Autonomous Vehicle Driver (Bertha Certified)
jobs.description:
TSMG cerca Autonomous Vehicle Driver (Bertha Certified) per attivita operative sul territorio in Geneva. Di seguito trovi il testo integrale dell'annuncio Lever, con responsabilita, requisiti e dettagli pratici del progetto.

Company Overview: Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a global leader in field data collection, founded in 2017 in Europe. We operate where automation falls short—collecting data through direct human observation and action. Our mission-driven teams span Europe, North America, and Asia, delivering rich, actionable insights to our partners. Role Overview: We are seeking a Bertha Certified Test Operator to support our autonomous vehicle projects. The Bertha certification indicates a high level of competence in real-world vehicle testing, system awareness, and public interaction—critical for gathering meaningful data and maintaining a safe AV experience.

## Panoramica del progetto

Company Overview: Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a global leader in field data collection, founded in 2017 in Europe. We operate where automation falls short—collecting data through direct human observation and action. Our mission-driven teams span Europe, North America, and Asia, delivering rich, actionable insights to our partners. Role Overview: We are seeking a Bertha Certified Test Operator to support our autonomous vehicle projects. The Bertha certification indicates a high level of competence in real-world vehicle testing, system awareness, and public interaction—critical for gathering meaningful data and maintaining a safe AV experience.

## Key Responsibilities:

- Operate and monitor autonomous vehicles with a focus on safety and system performance
- Provide real-time observations and log anomalies using dedicated software tools
- Engage with ride-hailing passengers as part of the AV experience
- Execute route testing in diverse environments, including city and highway scenarios
- Ensure compliance with Bertha certification protocols and data integrity standards
- Generate comprehensive test reports and collaborate with engineering teams
- Work variable shifts, including nights, weekends, and early mornings

## Required Qualifications:

- Bertha Certification for Autonomous Vehicle Testing
- Valid Class C driver’s license with a clean record and at least 3 years of experience
- Must be 21 years or older
- Comfortable using digital tools for reporting and analysis
- Excellent judgment, focus, and communication skills

Company Overview: Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We specialize in capturing data where automation cannot fully replace human observation. This role includes real-time monitoring of vehicle behavior, feedback reporting, and occasional manual driving. The T1 certification is a key qualification, ensuring familiarity with autonomous systems and safety protocols.

Company Overview: Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We specialize in capturing data where automation cannot fully replace human observation. Our teams operate across Europe, North America, and Asia, delivering data-driven insights through precision and adaptability. Role Overview: We are looking for a T1 Certified Autonomous Vehicle Test Operator to operate and evaluate autonomous vehicles in live environments. This role includes real-time monitoring of vehicle behavior, feedback reporting, and occasional manual driving. The T1 certification is a key qualification, ensuring familiarity with autonomous systems and safety protocols.

## Key Responsibilities:

- Operate autonomous vehicles on defined and exploratory routes in various traffic and weather conditions
- Monitor vehicle systems in autonomous mode; intervene manually when necessary
- Use software tools to log issues and provide detailed feedback
- Deliver ride-hailing service to the public as part of real-world AV testing
- Maintain safety protocols in accordance with T1-certified standards
- Complete detailed shift reports for engineering and operations teams
- Adapt to varying shift times, including early mornings, evenings, weekends, or overnight shifts

- T1 Certification for Autonomous Vehicle Operations
- Valid Class C driver’s license with 3+ years of clean driving experience
- At least 21 years of age
- Strong observational and communication skills
- Proficiency with laptops, mobile apps, and web-based reporting tools
- Excellent attention to detail and ability to document findings clearly

jobs.title: Autonomous vehicle Test Operator
jobs.description:
TSMG cerca Autonomous vehicle Test Operator per attivita operative sul territorio in Bern. Di seguito trovi il testo integrale dell'annuncio Lever, con responsabilita, requisiti e dettagli pratici del progetto.

Company description Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe, North America and Asia, ready to accept new challenges. Role Overview: The Autonomous Vehicle Test Operator is responsible for operating and evaluating a self-driving vehicle in autonomous mode, including collecting data and providing feedback, and offering ride hail service to the general public.

## Panoramica del progetto

Company description Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe, North America and Asia, ready to accept new challenges. Role Overview: The Autonomous Vehicle Test Operator is responsible for operating and evaluating a self-driving vehicle in autonomous mode, including collecting data and providing feedback, and offering ride hail service to the general public.

## Eligibility:

- Must be at least twenty-one (21) years old, possess a valid Class C  driver’s license, and have at least three (3) years of experience as a Class C licensed driver to operate Class C vehicles.

## Key responsibilities:

- Operate/Drive autonomous vehicles on both defined and undefined routes, including a variety of environmental conditions - driving (some manual driving but primarily monitoring the vehicle's behavior in autonomous mode) and (ii) software monitoring and logging responsibilities and providing verbal feedback/directions about the autonomous vehicles (AV) environment.
- Test other aspects of our autonomous vehicles
- Complete timely and detailed ride reports for our operations and engineering teams
- Must be able to work specific shifts, including early mornings, evenings, and/or weekends, as well as overnight shifts 
- Maintain high standard of safety, inside and outside of the vehicle.

## Necessary skills:

- Proficiency with a laptop and Office apps (i.e., Gmail, Sheets and Docs)
- Proficiency using a handheld device/touchscreen smartphone 
- Must have good attention to detail and be able to quickly and concisely describe their thoughts.

## Physical requirements:

- Occasional standing, walking, and long periods of sitting.
- Use hands to finger; handle or feel; and talk or hear; climb stairs and/or ladders.
- Occasionally required to reach with hands and arms; climb or balance; and stoop, kneel, crouch, or crawl.
- Must be able to occasionally lift and/or move up to 45 pounds.
- Must use close vision, distance vision, peripheral vision, depth perception, and ability to adjust focus.
- Most work is accomplished outdoors in a vehicle.

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We would be happy to get to know you and your skills better and see how we can support each other's growth. Please apply and let's meet!

Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe, North America and Asia, ready to accept new challenges. Role Overview: The Autonomous Vehicle Test Operator is responsible for operating and evaluating a self-driving vehicle in autonomous mode, including collecting data and providing feedback, and offering ride hail service to the general public.

## Eligibility:

- Must be at least twenty-one (21) years old, possess a valid Class C  driver’s license, and have at least three (3) years of experience as a Class C licensed driver to operate Class C vehicles.

## Key responsibilities:

- Operate/Drive autonomous vehicles on both defined and undefined routes, including a variety of environmental conditions - driving (some manual driving but primarily monitoring the vehicle's behavior in autonomous mode) and (ii) software monitoring and logging responsibilities and providing verbal feedback/directions about the autonomous vehicles (AV) environment.
- Test other aspects of our autonomous vehicles
- Complete timely and detailed ride reports for our operations and engineering teams
- Must be able to work specific shifts, including early mornings, evenings, and/or weekends, as well as overnight shifts 
- Maintain high standard of safety, inside and outside of the vehicle.

## Necessary skills:

- Proficiency with a laptop and Office apps (i.e., Gmail, Sheets and Docs)
- Proficiency using a handheld device/touchscreen smartphone 
- Must have good attention to detail and be able to quickly and concisely describe their thoughts.

## Physical requirements:

- Occasional standing, walking, and long periods of sitting.
- Use hands to finger; handle or feel; and talk or hear; climb stairs and/or ladders.
- Occasionally required to reach with hands and arms; climb or balance; and stoop, kneel, crouch, or crawl.
- Must be able to occasionally lift and/or move up to 45 pounds.
- Must use close vision, distance vision, peripheral vision, depth perception, and ability to adjust focus.
- Most work is accomplished outdoors in a vehicle.

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We would be happy to get to know you and your skills better and see how we can support each other's growth. Please apply and let's meet!

descriptionByLocale.it: TSMG cerca Autista / Addetto raccolta dati a Chalais, Svizzera per attività operative sul territorio in Chalais. Di seguito trovi il testo integrale dell'annuncio Lever, con responsabilità, requisiti e dettagli pratici del progetto. Descrizione dell'azienda Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) è una società di raccolta dati sul campo fondata nel 2017 in Europa. Noi raccogliamo dati dove l'automazione non è possibile. Contiamo le caratteristiche, prendiamo foto, facciamo video, registriamo discorsi e scansioniamo aree per ogni dettaglio di cui hai bisogno per prendere decisioni più informate. Le nostre squadre di raccolta dati sul campo sono sparse per tutta Europa e Nord America, pronte ad accettare nuove sfide. Obiettivo del progetto L'obiettivo del progetto è aiutare a raccogliere immagini di strade, principali punti di interesse e aree pubbliche nei paesi dell'UE. Il progetto viene eseguito su auto con 360 telecamere montate sopra che immagazzinano l'area intorno al veicolo e memorizzano quelle immagini nei computer all'interno del veicolo. Più tardi, questi dati verranno utilizzati per migliorare una delle mappe online più popolari al mondo. I raccoglitori di dati riceveranno percorsi specifici intorno a strade e aree pubbliche, puntando specificamente quartieri commerciali e siti storici. A causa delle cattive condizioni meteorologiche, alcune aree verranno visitate più volte per raccogliere la migliore qualità di immagini. Il progetto è previsto per durare da 3 a 6 mesi e coprirà diverse aree di raccolta dati. Il candidato ideale ama guidare, conosce bene l'area, le tendenze del traffico, è altamente responsabile e affidabile. L'orario previsto sul progetto è dal lunedì al venerdì, 8 ore al giorno 40 ore a settimana. A causa del tempo di inattività meteorologica, il lavoro nei fine settimana è possibile. ## Requisiti: - Deve avere una patente di guida valida; - Buone capacità di guida e record di guida pulito; - Posto di parcheggio privato monitorato per il veicolo aziendale sarebbe un plus; - Conoscenze generali dell'auto sarebbero un plus; - Ama guidare, entro gli orari standard di lavoro; - Disponibile per un minimo di 3 mesi; - Ottime capacità di comunicazione e segnalazione; - Tech savvy (i guidatori utilizzeranno Gmail, Google Forms, Google Meet e WhatsApp); - Alto livello di responsabilità; - Motivato da sé e orientato ai dettagli.
descriptionByLocale.en: TSMG cerca Autista / Addetto raccolta dati in Chalais, Switzerland per attivita operative sul territorio in Chalais. Di seguito trovi il testo integrale dell'annuncio Lever, con responsabilita, requisiti e dettagli pratici del progetto. Company description Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges. Project objective The goal of the project is to help collect images of streets, main points of interest and public areas in the EU countries. The project is performed on cars with 360 cameras mounted on top that image the area around the vehicle and store those images on computers inside the vehicle. Later, this data will be used to enhance one the most popular online maps in the world. The data collectors will be given specific routes around public streets and areas, specifically targeting commercial districts and historical sites. Due to poor weather conditions some areas will be visited multiple times in order to collect the best quality of imaging. The project is expected to last from 3 to 6 months and will cover different data collection areas. The ideal candidate enjoys driving, knows well the area, traffic trends, is highly responsible and reliable. The schedule expected on the project is Monday-Friday, 8 hours/day 40 hours per week. Due to weather downtime, work on weekends is possible. ## Requirements: - Must have a valid Driver Licence; - Good driving skills and clean driving record; - Private monitored parking space for corporate vehicle would be a plus; - General car knowledge would be a plus; - Enjoys driving, within standard business hours; - Available for a minimum of 3 months; - Great communication and reporting skills; - Tech savvy (drivers will use Gmail, Google Forms, Google Meet and WhatsApp); - High level of responsibility; - Self-motivated and detail-oriented. ## Informazioni aggiuntive We would be happy to get to know you and your skills better and see how we can support each other's growth. Please apply and let's meet!
descriptionByLocale.de: TSMG sucht einen Fahrer / Datenaufnahme-Assistenten in Chalais, Schweiz für operative Tätigkeiten im Gebiet von Chalais. Im Folgenden finden Sie den vollständigen Text des Lever-Angebots mit Verantwortlichkeiten, Anforderungen und praktischen Details des Projekts. Firmenbeschreibung Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) ist ein Unternehmen für die Feldaufnahme von Daten, das 2017 in Europa gegründet wurde. Wir sammeln Daten, wo Automatisierung nicht möglich ist. Wir zählen Merkmale, machen Fotos, erstellen Videos, zeichnen Sprache auf und scannen Bereiche für jedes Detail, das Sie benötigen, um fundiertere Entscheidungen zu treffen. Unsere Feldteams zur Datenerfassung sind in ganz Europa und Nordamerika verteilt und bereit, neue Herausforderungen anzunehmen. Projektziel Das Ziel des Projekts besteht darin, Bilder von Straßen, Hauptsehenswürdigkeiten und öffentlichen Bereichen in den Ländern der EU zu sammeln. Das Projekt wird in Autos mit 360 Kameras auf dem Dach durchgeführt, die das Gebiet um das Fahrzeug abbilden und diese Bilder in den Computern im Fahrzeug speichern. Später werden diese Daten verwendet, um eine der beliebtesten Online-Karten der Welt zu verbessern. Die Datenaufnehmer erhalten spezifische Routen um öffentliche Straßen und Bereiche, mit einem besonderen Augenmerk auf Gewerbegebiete und historische Stätten. Aufgrund schlechter Wetterbedingungen werden einige Bereiche mehrmals besucht, um die beste Bildqualität zu sammeln. Das Projekt ist für eine Dauer von 3 bis 6 Monaten geplant und wird verschiedene Datenerfassungsbereiche abdecken. Der ideale Kandidat genießt das Fahren, kennt das Gebiet gut, Verkehrsströme, ist hochverantwortlich und zuverlässig. Der erwartete Arbeitsplan im Projekt ist Montag bis Freitag, 8 Stunden pro Tag, 40 Stunden pro Woche. Aufgrund von Wetterausfällen ist eine Arbeit am Wochenende möglich. ## Anforderungen: - Muss einen gültigen Führerschein haben; - Gute Fahrkünste und sauberes Fahrtenbuch; - Privater überwachter Parkplatz für das Unternehmensfahrzeug wäre ein Plus; - Allgemeines Wissen über Autos wäre ein Plus; - Genießt das Fahren, innerhalb der standardmäßigen Geschäftszeiten; - Verfügbar für mindestens 3 Monate; - Große Kommunikations- und Berichterstattungsfähigkeiten; - Tech-savvy (Fahrer werden Gmail, Google Forms, Google Meet und WhatsApp nutzen); - Hoches Verantwortungsbewusstsein; - Selbstmotiviert und detailorientiert.
descriptionByLocale.fr: TSMG recherche un Chauffeur / Collecteur de données à Chalais, Suisse pour des activités opérationnelles sur le terrain à Chalais. Voici le texte intégral de l'offre Lever, avec responsabilités, exigences et détails pratiques du projet. Description de l'entreprise Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) est une entreprise de collecte de données sur le terrain fondée en 2017 en Europe. Nous collectons des données là où l'automatisation n'est pas possible. Nous comptons les caractéristiques, prenons des photos, faisons des vidéos, enregistrons des discours et scannons des zones pour chaque détail dont vous avez besoin pour prendre des décisions plus éclairées. Nos équipes de collecte de données sur le terrain sont réparties en Europe et en Amérique du Nord, prêtes à accepter de nouveaux défis. Objectif du projet L'objectif du projet est d'aider à collecter des images de rues, principaux points d'intérêt et espaces publics dans les pays de l'UE. Le projet est réalisé sur des voitures avec 360 caméras montées sur le toit qui photographient la zone autour du véhicule et stockent ces images sur les ordinateurs à l'intérieur du véhicule. Plus tard, ces données seront utilisées pour améliorer l'une des cartes en ligne les plus populaires au monde. Les collecteurs de données recevront des itinéraires spécifiques autour de rues et d'espaces publics, ciblant spécifiquement les quartiers commerciaux et les sites historiques. En raison des mauvaises conditions météorologiques, certaines zones seront visitées plusieurs fois afin de collecter la meilleure qualité d'imagerie. Le projet est prévu pour durer de 3 à 6 mois et couvrira différentes zones de collecte de données. Le candidat idéal aime conduire, connaît bien la zone, les tendances du trafic, est hautement responsable et fiable. L'horaire prévu sur le projet est du lundi au vendredi, 8 heures par jour 40 heures par semaine. En raison des temps d'arrêt météorologiques, le travail le week-end est possible. ## Exigences: - Doit avoir un permis de conduire valide; - Bonnes compétences de conduite et historique de conduite propre; - Un espace de stationnement privé surveillé pour le véhicule d'entreprise serait un plus; - Connaissances générales des voitures seraient un plus; - Aime conduire, dans les heures standard de travail; - Disponible pour un minimum de 3 mois; - Excellentes compétences en communication et en reporting; - Tech savvy (les conducteurs utiliseront Gmail, Google Forms, Google Meet et WhatsApp); - Niveau élevé de responsabilité; - Automotivé et orienté vers les détails.

Le nostre squadre di raccolta dati sul campo sono sparse in Europa e in Nord America, pronte ad accettare nuove sfide. Obiettivo del progetto Il fine del progetto e' aiutare a raccogliere immagini di strade, punti di interesse principali e aree pubbliche nei paesi dell'UE. jobs.title: Autista / Addetto raccolta dati in Basel, Switzerland
jobs.description:
TSMG cerca Autista / Addetto raccolta dati in Basel, Switzerland per attivita operative sul territorio in Basel. Di seguito trovi il testo integrale dell'annuncio Lever, con responsabilita, requisiti e dettagli pratici del progetto.

Company description Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges. Project Overview This project aims to collect high-quality visuals of streets, key points of interest, and public spaces across EU countries. Using vehicles equipped with removable 360° cameras and lidars, drivers will capture comprehensive images of the surroundings. The captured data will be stored on onboard computers (SSD Drives) and later utilized to enhance one of the world’s leading online mapping platforms. Data collectors will follow pre-assigned routes, focusing on public streets, commercial areas, and points of interest. To ensure the highest image quality, certain areas may need to be revisited during favorable weather conditions. The duration of the project varies based on the scope of work required in each targeted data collection area. On average, the assignments involve 3 to 6 months of active work. Work schedule: full time engagement within standard business hours (8 AM - 7 PM). The recruitment process for the position of a Driver involves such steps: safety driving test, interview with recruiter, and onboarding process.

## Panoramica del progetto

## Ideal Candidate:

- Holds a valid EU-issued driver’s license.
- Maintains a clean background check (criminal and driving record).
- Has at least 5 years of driving experience.
- Possesses professional driving experience (e.g., taxi, delivery, logistics).
- Proficient in English and the local language.
- Tech-savvy, with experience using GSuite tools (Gmail, Google Spreadsheets, Google Forms).
- Basic knowledge of vehicle mechanics.
- Demonstrates responsibility, reliability, and professionalism.
- Enjoys traveling and exploring new places.
- Familiar with the area of operations.

## What We Offer:

- A dynamic and engaging project that goes beyond just driving.
- Competitive salary.
- Comprehensive training covering both practical and theoretical aspects of data collection.
- Ongoing support from experienced managers.
- The opportunity to work in an international team and environment.

## Informazioni aggiuntive

If you’re interested, apply now and join us in shaping the future of data collection!

descriptionByLocale.it: TSMG cerca Autista / Addetto raccolta dati in Bellinzona, Switzerland per attività operative sul territorio in Bellinzona. Di seguito trovi il testo integrale dell'annuncio Lever, con responsabilità, requisiti e dettagli pratici del progetto. Company description Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) è un'azienda di raccolta dati sul campo fondata nel 2017 in Europa. Raccogliamo dati dove l'automazione non è possibile. Contiamo caratteristiche, scattiamo foto, realizziamo video, registriamo discorsi e analizziamo aree per ogni dettaglio necessario a prendere decisioni più informate. I nostri team di raccolta dati sul campo sono distribuiti in tutta Europa e Nord America, pronti ad accettare nuove sfide. Project Overview Questo progetto mira a raccogliere immagini di alta qualità di strade, punti di interesse chiave e spazi pubblici nei paesi dell'UE. Utilizzando veicoli dotati di telecamere rimovibili a 360° e lidar, i conducenti cattureranno immagini complete dell'ambiente circostante. I dati acquisiti saranno memorizzati su computer di bordo (unità SSD) e successivamente utilizzati per migliorare una delle principali piattaforme di mappatura online al mondo. I raccoglitori di dati seguiranno percorsi preassegnati, concentrandosi su strade pubbliche, aree commerciali e punti di interesse. Per garantire la massima qualità delle immagini, alcune aree potrebbero dover essere rivisitate in condizioni meteorologiche favorevoli. La durata del progetto varia in base all'entità del lavoro richiesto in ciascuna area di raccolta dati target. In media, gli incarichi prevedono da 3 a 6 mesi di lavoro attivo. Orario di lavoro: impegno a tempo pieno durante l'orario lavorativo standard (8:00 - 19:00). Il processo di selezione per la posizione di Autista prevede i seguenti passaggi: test di guida sicura, colloquio con il recruiter e processo di onboarding. ## Panoramica del progetto Company description Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) è un'azienda di raccolta dati sul campo fondata nel 2017 in Europa. Il processo di selezione per la posizione di Autista prevede i seguenti passaggi: test di guida sicura, colloquio con il recruiter e processo di onboarding. ## Candidato ideale: - Possiede una patente di guida valida rilasciata nell'UE. - Mantiene un controllo dei precedenti pulito (penale e di guida). - Ha almeno 5 anni di esperienza di guida. - Possiede esperienza professionale di guida (ad esempio, taxi, consegne, logistica). - È fluente in inglese e nella lingua locale. - È esperto di tecnologia, con esperienza nell'uso degli strumenti GSuite (Gmail, Google Spreadsheets, Google Forms). - Ha conoscenze di base di meccanica dei veicoli. - Dimostra responsabilità, affidabilità e professionalità. - Ama viaggiare ed esplorare nuovi luoghi. - Conosce bene l'area di operazioni. ## Cosa offriamo: - Un progetto dinamico e coinvolgente che va oltre la semplice guida. - Stipendio competitivo. - Formazione completa che copre sia gli aspetti pratici che teorici della raccolta dati. - Supporto continuo da parte di manager esperti. - L'opportunità di lavorare in un team e in un ambiente internazionale. ## Informazioni aggiuntive Se sei interessato,

descriptionByLocale.fr: TSMG recherche un Chauffeur / Collecteur de données à Bellinzona, Suisse pour des activités opérationnelles sur le terrain à Bellinzona. Vous trouverez ci-dessous le texte intégral de l'annonce Lever, avec les responsabilités, exigences et détails pratiques du projet. Description de l'entreprise Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) est une entreprise de collecte de données sur le terrain fondée en 2017 en Europe. Nous collectons des données là où l'automatisation n'est pas possible. Nous comptons des caractéristiques, prenons des photos, réalisons des vidéos, enregistrons des discours et analysons des zones pour chaque détail nécessaire à des décisions plus éclairées. Nos équipes de collecte de données sur le terrain sont réparties à travers l'Europe et l'Amérique du Nord, prêtes à relever de nouveaux défis. Aperçu du projet Ce projet vise à collecter des images de haute qualité des rues, des points d'intérêt clés et des espaces publics dans les pays de l'UE. À l'aide de véhicules équipés de caméras 360° amovibles et de lidars, les conducteurs captureront des images complètes des environs. Les données collectées seront stockées sur des ordinateurs embarqués (disques SSD) et utilisées ultérieurement pour améliorer l'une des principales plateformes de cartographie en ligne au monde. Les collecteurs de données suivront des itinéraires prédéfinis, en se concentrant sur les rues publiques, les zones commerciales et les points d'intérêt. Pour garantir la meilleure qualité d'image, certaines zones devront être revisitées dans des conditions météorologiques favorables. La durée du projet varie en fonction de l'étendue des travaux requis dans chaque zone de collecte de données ciblée. En moyenne, les missions impliquent 3 à 6 mois de travail actif. Horaires de travail : engagement à temps plein pendant les heures de bureau standard (8h00 - 19h00). Le processus de recrutement pour le poste de Chauffeur comprend les étapes suivantes : test de conduite sécuritaire, entretien avec un recruteur et processus d'intégration. ## Aperçu du projet Description de l'entreprise Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) est une entreprise de collecte de données sur le terrain fondée en 2017 en Europe. Les données collectées seront stockées sur des ordinateurs embarqués (disques SSD) et utilisées ultérieurement pour améliorer l'une des principales plateformes de cartographie en ligne au monde. Les collecteurs de données suivront des itinéraires prédéfinis, en se concentrant sur les rues publiques, les zones commerciales et les points d'intérêt. Le processus de recrutement pour le poste de Chauffeur comprend les étapes suivantes : test de conduite sécuritaire, entretien avec un recruteur et processus d'intégration. ## Candidat idéal : - Détient un permis de conduire valide délivré par l'UE. - Dispose d'un casier judiciaire et d'un dossier de conduite vierges. - Possède au moins 5 ans d'expérience de conduite. - A une expérience professionnelle de conduite (par exemple, taxi, livraison, logistique). - Maîtrise l'anglais et la langue locale. - À l'aise avec la technologie, avec une expérience des outils GSuite (Gmail, Google Spreadsheets, Google Forms). - Connaissances de base en mécanique automobile. - Fait preuve de responsabilité, de fiabilité et de professionnalisme. - Aime voyager et explorer de nouveaux endroits. - Connaît bien la zone d'opérations. ## Ce que nous offrons : - Un projet dynamique et engageant qui va au-delà de la simple conduite. - Salaire compétitif. - Formation complète couvrant les aspects pratiques et théoriques de la collecte de données. - Soutien continu de la part de gestionnaires expérimentés. - L'opportunité de travailler dans une équipe et un environnement internationaux. ## Informations supplémentaires Si vous êtes intéressé, postulez dès maintenant et rejoignez-nous pour façonner l'avenir de la collecte de données !

TSMG cerca Autista / Addetto raccolta dati in Chur, Switzerland per attivita operative sul territorio in Chur. Di seguito trovi il testo integrale dell'annuncio Lever, con responsabilita, requisiti e dettagli pratici del progetto.

Company description Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges. Project Overview This project aims to collect high-quality visuals of streets, key points of interest, and public spaces across EU countries. Using vehicles equipped with removable 360° cameras and lidars, drivers will capture comprehensive images of the surroundings. The captured data will be stored on onboard computers (SSD Drives) and later utilized to enhance one of the world’s leading online mapping platforms. Data collectors will follow pre-assigned routes, focusing on public streets, commercial areas, and points of interest. To ensure the highest image quality, certain areas may need to be revisited during favorable weather conditions. The duration of the project varies based on the scope of work required in each targeted data collection area. On average, the assignments involve 3 to 6 months of active work. Work schedule: full time engagement within standard business hours (8 AM - 7 PM). The recruitment process for the position of a Driver involves such steps: safety driving test, interview with recruiter, and onboarding process.

jobs.title: Field Data Collection Specialist\Surveyor
jobs.description:
TSMG cerca Field Data Collection Specialist\Surveyor per attivita operative sul territorio in Basel. Di seguito trovi il testo integrale dell'annuncio Lever, con responsabilita, requisiti e dettagli pratici del progetto.

Company description: Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges. Project description: The goal of the project is to collect visual and geo data for online mapping applications improvements. The Task: We are looking for a team of pedestrians/surveyors in some of the European countries. People will be provided with a special backpack with a camera mounted on the top. The mail task will be to walk from location to location within the frames of the assigned area to let the camera film the surroundings. Schedule: Monday - Friday, from 6 to 8 hours/day.

## Panoramica del progetto

Company description: Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges. Project description: The goal of the project is to collect visual and geo data for online mapping applications improvements. The Task: We are looking for a team of pedestrians/surveyors in some of the European countries. People will be provided with a special backpack with a camera mounted on the top. The mail task will be to walk from location to location within the frames of the assigned area to let the camera film the surroundings. Schedule: Monday - Friday, from 6 to 8 hours/day.

## Requirements:

- Good physical shape (~5-6 hours of walking every day).
- Excellent communication skills.
- Attention to details. 
- Fluent English (at least B1+).
- Drivers licence. 
- Must be eligible for travels.
- Experience in the data collection field is a big advantage but not required.

## What we provide:

- We provide a full training before the project starts (the training is paid).
- All expenses related to travel, data plan, SIM card purchase are covered. 
- All necessary equipment is also provided by the company.
- A letter of recommendation mentioning your experience in the data collection field.
- Full management support and opportunity to grow.

jobs.title: Field Surveyor
jobs.description:
TSMG cerca Field Surveyor per attivita operative sul territorio in Zurich. Di seguito trovi il testo integrale dell'annuncio Lever, con responsabilita, requisiti e dettagli pratici del progetto.

Company Description Terry Soot Management Group (TSMG) is a field data collection company founded in 2017 in Europe. We collect data where automation is not possible. We count features, take pictures, make videos, record speech, and scan areas for every detail you need to make more informed decisions. Our field data collection teams are spread across Europe and North America, ready to accept new challenges. Project Objective The goal of the project is to conduct a field survey for city stations in order to improve the mapping service. The Task The data collectors will be given specific stations on each day that they will need to attend. Operator will be using a working device to collect attributes at the station and create pathways from station’s entrance to platforms. Therefore we are looking for someone who is active and likes visiting new places. Duration The project is ongoing and we are looking for a new person to join our team. Schedule The schedule is Monday-Friday, 8 hours/day 40 hours per week.

## Requirements:

- Good physical shape (~4 hours of walking every day).
- Excellent communication skills.
- Attention to details. 
- Fluent English (at least B1+).
- Experience in the data collection field is a big advantage but not required.

## What we provide:

- We provide a full training before the project starts (the training is paid).
- All expenses related to travel, data plan, SIM card purchase are covered.
- All necessary equipment (smartphone) is also provided by the company.
- A letter of recommendation mentioning your experience in the data collection field. 
- Full management support and opportunity to grow.

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We would be happy to get to know you and your skills better and see how we can support each other's growth. Please apply and let's meet!

jobs.title: Remote Vehicle Supervisor / Teleoperator
jobs.description:
TSMG cerca Remote Vehicle Supervisor / Teleoperator per attivita operative sul territorio in Bern. Di seguito trovi il testo integrale dell'annuncio Lever, con responsabilita, requisiti e dettagli pratici del progetto.

Role Overview We are looking for a part-time Remote Vehicle Supervisor / Teleoperator to support our autonomous delivery vehicle operations in Bern. The supervisor will be responsible for overseeing vehicle movements from the office twice weekly, ensuring safety and smooth performance during each operation. This role is ideal for someone who is tech-savvy, dependable, and familiar with Bern’s urban environment. Hours may increase as the project expands.

## Responsibilities:

- Remotely monitor and supervise the autonomous vehicle during scheduled delivery operations
- Ensure safe and compliant vehicle performance during active hours
- React promptly and appropriately to any necessary interventions or unexpected events
- Communicate with both internal team (French/English) and the customer’s team (primarily German-speaking)
- Be available within a 45-minute notice window before deliveries, and adaptable to varying delivery times (e.g., morning and/or late afternoon)

## Requirements:

- Experience in remote supervision or teleoperation is a plus
- Good knowledge of Bern’s streets and surroundings
- Strong computer skills and ability to use monitoring software/tools
- Strong German language
- English or French language
- Flexible availability on Tuesdays and Wednesdays for changing delivery windows
- Must work on-site at the office in Bern during vehicle operation
- Dependable, detail-oriented, and comfortable in a fast-evolving environment
- No weekend work required
